message:
refactor(ci): Use pre-built Python 3.13.11 for all CPython tests

Replace build-from-source approach with actions/setup-python pre-built
binaries for Linux and macOS CPython reference tests. Windows was
already using this approach.

Benefits:
- Faster: ~30s setup vs 10-15 min build time per job
- Simpler: Removes 152 lines of build logic
- Reliable: No apt-get/brew failures, no cache key management
- Consistent: All platforms use same approach with pinned 3.13.11

The pre-built binaries from actions/python-versions are identical to
what would be built from source and include the test_datetime locale
fix from v3.13.11.

files.patch:
@@ -439,38 +439,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           submodules: true
 
-      - name: Cache Python 3.13.11 build
-        uses: actions/cache@v3
-        id: python-cache
+      - name: Setup Python 3.13.11
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          path: /tmp/python-install
-          key: python-627894459a84be3488a1789919679c997056a03c-${{ runner.os }}
-
-      - name: Build Python 3.13.11 from source
-        if: steps.python-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
-        run: |
-          sudo apt-get update
-          sudo apt-get install -y build-essential gdb lcov pkg-config \
-            libbz2-dev libffi-dev libgdbm-dev libgdbm-compat-dev liblzma-dev \
-            libncurses5-dev libreadline6-dev libsqlite3-dev libssl-dev \
-            lzma lzma-dev tk-dev uuid-dev zlib1g-dev
-
-          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/python/cpython.git /tmp/cpython
-          cd /tmp/cpython
-          git fetch --depth 1 origin 627894459a84be3488a1789919679c997056a03c
-          git checkout 627894459a84be3488a1789919679c997056a03c
-
-          ./configure --prefix=/tmp/python-install --enable-optimizations
-          make -j$(nproc)
-          make install
-
-      - name: Add Python to PATH
-        run: echo "/tmp/python-install/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
-
-      - name: Verify Python version
-        run: |
-          python3 --version
-          python3 -c "import sys; print(f'Python {sys.version}')"
+          python-version: "3.13.11"
 
       - name: Run CPython tests (core1)
         run: |
